content: Hi, are the facilitys for kprobe and ftrace up in rust? If not can some one point me to the direction on how to implement them, I would like to help.
You mean a trace point implemented in Rust or adding a trace point in Rust code?
If it's the latter, I have an example you can play with: https://github.com/fbq/linux/commit/1569a4ec3d1b3eb5deba3cff76e921da92ae6c89
Not sure, was talking about CONFIG_FUNCTION_TRACER and FPROBE
Oh, like enabling function tracer for Rust code?

I guess you will need to find how to instrument Rust function then. For ftrace, _mcount() is used IIUC.

Looks like Rust support them via -Zinstrument-mcount. And also Google gives me this: https://lib.rs/crates/rftrace
